creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to dt71 from comment #11)

@emaste: I can not reproduce this on 11-release or -head. Do you have easy access to a stable/10 or 10.3-RELEASE machine to confirm whether or not this is present there? I can't seem to pin down a specific reason that this no longer segfaults, but assuming we're not finding erroneous output and can't reproduce this on any support releases, I think it would be safe to consider this 'closed'
